name: Cthulhu: Death Escape / 克苏鲁:死亡逃脱 Prototype
short_description: Trapped in an eerie dungeon, you must solve puzzles and evade lurking horrors to find the only chance of survival. Every step could lead you to freedom...or to your demise...
detailed_description:
Objectives: Collect Ancient Coins and Find a Way to Open the Exit

Mouse - Interact

W A S D - Move

Shift - Switch Run and Walk

Tab - inventory / Show and Hide Cursor

  • Unique Underwater World- Dive Deep to Discover an Unknown Underwater World that No One‘s Been There Before...

  • Danger is in Everywhere - Monsters will randomly cause big troubles and put you in extreme danger. You must hide or run before they find you...

  • Items Respawn Randomly - Every time the situation is different, try your best to collect coins as many as possible...

  • Interactive Dead Body - Dig! Dig! Dig! You may find something in dead bodies by using knives... in the beta version, you can use knives as many times as you can.
